how_to_score: Code each response 1 if it mentions fragrance, scent, smell, aroma, diffuser, reed diffuser, room scent, home fragrance, or air freshener.
fail_action: Make diffuser/fragrance visually and verbally dominant; reduce crystal and astrology emphasis.

how_to_score: Use PickFu vote share. In a 30-person 4-way pilot, treat this only as directional.
pass_gate: Winner >=35% and >=10 percentage points ahead of runner-up
fail_action: Run a 100-person follow-up or test fewer routes; do not choose based on a tiny margin.

target: Mystic framing does not create rejection
how_to_score: Code 1 if comment includes scam, fake, too witchy, weird, confusing, childish, cheap, gimmicky, culty, or unbelievable.
fail_action: Shift language toward room mood, scent finder, giftable fragrance, and self-care ritual.

how_to_score: Code 1 if comment mentions gift, birthday, housewarming, dorm, apartment, friend, holiday, self-gift, or cute present.
fail_action: Clarify gift-box format, occasion cues, and price-value logic.

target: Appeal comes from fragrance not only crystals
how_to_score: Code 1 if comment mentions scent, smell, aroma, fragrance, room feeling, freshness, cozy, relaxing, clean, or nice atmosphere as the reason.
fail_action: Make hero scent notes and room benefit more prominent; crystals remain secondary.

how_to_score: Code 1 if comment mentions quiz, match, personalized, result, sign, vibe, mood finder, or recommendation.
fail_action: Simplify quiz language: take quiz -> get scent sign -> choose diffuser.

how_to_score: Code 1 if comment says yes/maybe for self or gift with a clear reason.
fail_action: Revise offer, price cue, or product clarity before any ad or inventory spend.

how_to_score: Collect stated reasonable price, then calculate median and common clusters.
pass_gate: No hard pass gate in pilot
fail_action: Use only as directional input for a separate Van Westendorp price test.
